EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} could not remove a key pair on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} could not create a key pair on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} created a key pair on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} removed a key pair on host {event_src.host}
